queries.question: what is the socioeconomic status of readers of articles published by Author B?
queries.sql: Select status, description from Socioeconomic_Status JOIN Readers ON Readers.Socioeconomic_Status_id = Socioeconomic_Status.id JOIN Article_Readers ON Article_Readers.reader_id = Readers.id JOIN Articles ON Article_Readers.article_id = Articles.id JOIN Authors ON Articles.author_id = Authors.id WHERE author_name = 'Author B'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?status ?description WHERE {
  ?socioeconomic_status a :Socioeconomic_Status .
  ?readers a :Readers .
  ?readers p:hasSocioeconomic_Status ?socioeconomic_status .
  ?article_readers a :Article_Readers .
  ?article_readers p:hasReaders ?readers .
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?article_readers p:hasArticles ?articles .
  ?authors a :Authors .
  ?articles p:hasAuthors ?authors .
  ?socioeconomic_status p:status ?status .
  ?socioeconomic_status p:description ?description .
  ?authors p:author_name ?author_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?author_name_f) = "Author B")
}

queries.question: give me the socioeconomic status for the demographic of readers of the article titled Economic Recovery Strategies
queries.sql: Select status, description from Socioeconomic_Status JOIN Readers ON Readers.Socioeconomic_Status_id = Socioeconomic_Status.id JOIN Article_Readers ON Article_Readers.reader_id = Readers.id JOIN Articles ON Article_Readers.article_id = Articles.id WHERE title = 'Economic Recovery Strategies'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?status ?description WHERE {
  ?socioeconomic_status a :Socioeconomic_Status .
  ?readers a :Readers .
  ?readers p:hasSocioeconomic_Status ?socioeconomic_status .
  ?article_readers a :Article_Readers .
  ?article_readers p:hasReaders ?readers .
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?article_readers p:hasArticles ?articles .
  ?socioeconomic_status p:status ?status .
  ?socioeconomic_status p:description ?description .
  ?articles p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Economic Recovery Strategies")
}

queries.question: what are min age and max age for readers of articles published by Author B?
queries.sql: Select max_age, min_age from Age_Range JOIN Readers ON Readers.age_range_id = Age_Range.id JOIN Article_Readers ON Article_Readers.reader_id = Readers.id JOIN Articles ON Article_Readers.article_id = Articles.id JOIN Authors ON Articles.author_id = Authors.id WHERE author_name = 'Author B'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?max_age ?min_age WHERE {
  ?age_range a :Age_Range .
  ?readers a :Readers .
  ?readers p:hasAge_Range ?age_range .
  ?article_readers a :Article_Readers .
  ?article_readers p:hasReaders ?readers .
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?article_readers p:hasArticles ?articles .
  ?authors a :Authors .
  ?articles p:hasAuthors ?authors .
  ?age_range p:max_age ?max_age .
  ?age_range p:min_age ?min_age .
  ?authors p:author_name ?author_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?author_name_f) = "Author B")
}
